name: kite_zombie_nearby
description: Back away from nearest zombie while swinging stone sword, maintaining safe distance
parameters: z.object({ weaponName: z.string().default("stone_sword").describe("Name of the sword to use for defending while kiting"), preferredDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(2).max(10).default(6).describe("Distance to maintain from the nearest zombie"), maxDurationMs: z.number().min(1000).max(60000).default(5000).describe("Maximum time in milliseconds to perform the kiting behavior") })

name: build_defensive_pillar
description: Place blocks to create a pillar and gain height while blocking enemy line of sight
parameters: z.object({ height: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).describe("Total blocks to rise by pillaring upward"), materialName: z.string().describe("The name of the material to use, for example 'oak_planks'"), maxBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(64).default(20).describe("Maximum blocks to consume during the process") })
